x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HS case volume determines the impact of Now Assist case summarization and AI-assisted resolution. Higher case volumes mean greater time savings for safety managers who benefit most from AI-generated summaries and recommended actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure health and safety cases are being submitted through the HS module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[HS case volume determines the impact of Now Assist case summarization and AI-assisted resolution. Higher case volumes mean greater time savings for safety managers who benefit most from AI-generated summaries and recommended actions.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>HS Case Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hs_cm_case");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" cases",finding:c+" HS cases found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" cases",finding:c+" HS cases found. Limited data."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 cases",finding:"No HS cases found. Module may be newly deployed."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>HS</module>
<number>CHK0006169</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure health and safety cases are being submitted through the HS module.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3c</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
